metrics.name: Containment Rate
metrics.desc: % of interactions fully resolved by agent without human intervention
metrics.drift: Alert when any intent drops >5pts below 4-week rolling baseline

metrics.name: Verified Resolution Rate
metrics.desc: Confirmed resolution via surveys, no-callback within 48h, or QA review
metrics.good: Within 10pts of raw containment; re-contact rate <15%
metrics.drift: Gap widening between raw containment and verified resolution

metrics.name: Resolution Accuracy
metrics.desc: Factual correctness of agent's proposed resolution or action
metrics.drift: Run daily golden-dataset evals; track by intent category

metrics.name: CSAT / NPS Delta
metrics.desc: Satisfaction gap between AI-handled and human-handled interactions
metrics.good: AI CSAT within 5-10% of human CSAT; gap trending closed
metrics.drift: AI CSAT drops >5% below baseline or gap widens >3pts

metrics.name: First Contact Resolution
metrics.desc: Issues resolved on first AI contact without repeat contact within 48h
metrics.drift: FCR trending down or re-contact rate rising above 15%

metrics.name: Save Rate / Retention
metrics.desc: % of at-risk customers successfully saved by retention agents
metrics.good: 45%+ save rate; positive margin per save
metrics.drift: Save rate declining or post-save churn increasing

metrics.name: Compliance Adherence
metrics.desc: Aggregate regulatory and policy compliance posture
metrics.drift: Any compliance failure trend; regulatory audit findings

metrics.name: Credit / Discount Governance
metrics.desc: Total AI-issued credits and discounts vs approved policy matrix
metrics.good: Within 10% of approved matrix; daily total within budget
metrics.drift: Daily total exceeds 115% budget; avg credit deviates >$2

metrics.name: Quote / Order Accuracy
metrics.desc: % of agent-generated quotes and orders passing validation error-free
metrics.drift: Track by channel and order type; alert on fallout increase

metrics.name: Conversion Impact
metrics.desc: Conversion rate lift attributable to agent assistance vs unassisted baseline
metrics.drift: Declining lift over time; compare agent vs control weekly

metrics.name: Cross-sell / Upsell Acceptance
metrics.desc: Rate at which cross-sell recommendations are accepted by customers
metrics.good: 15-25% acceptance; positive ARPU impact without churn increase
metrics.drift: Acceptance declining or post-sale churn increasing

metrics.name: Lead Qualification Rate
metrics.desc: % of agent-scored leads that convert to qualified opportunities
metrics.good: 30-40% MQL-to-SQL conversion; declining false positive rate
metrics.drift: Conversion rate dropping or sales team rejecting more leads

metrics.name: Onboarding Completion
metrics.desc: % of new customers completing full onboarding journey within 14 days
metrics.drift: Completion dropping or first-bill complaint rate rising

metrics.name: Renewal Conversion
metrics.desc: % of renewal-eligible customers who renew or upgrade
metrics.drift: Renewal rate declining at device payment completion window

metrics.name: Journey Completion Rate
metrics.desc: % of customers completing lifecycle communication journeys as designed
metrics.drift: Completion rate dropping or opt-out rate rising

metrics.name: NBO Acceptance Rate
metrics.desc: % of Next-Best-Offer recommendations accepted by customers
metrics.drift: Acceptance declining while volume constant; offers repetitive

metrics.name: Campaign ROI
metrics.desc: Return on investment for agent-optimized campaigns vs manually managed
metrics.drift: ROI improvement narrowing; CPA creeping upward

metrics.name: Customer 360 Completeness
metrics.desc: % of customer profiles with unified, enriched data across all systems
metrics.drift: Completeness declining; duplicate rate increasing

metrics.name: Hallucination Rate
metrics.desc: % of responses with fabricated information (policies, prices, procedures)
metrics.drift: Daily automated eval against golden dataset; alert on any increase

metrics.name: Human Override Rate
metrics.desc: Frequency and reasons humans override or correct agent actions
metrics.good: Declining trend; <10% override rate for mature agents
metrics.drift: Rising override rate or new override reason categories emerging

metrics.name: Escalation Quality Score
metrics.desc: Rubric score for handoff completeness: context, issue ID, sentiment, history
metrics.drift: Median drops below 3.5/5 or poor escalations exceed 15%

metrics.name: Recommendation Relevance
metrics.desc: % of agent recommendations accepted (plans, devices, offers, content)
metrics.drift: Acceptance dropping while recommendation volume stays constant

metrics.name: Disclosure Compliance
metrics.desc: Completion of required regulatory disclosures in transactions
metrics.drift: Automated audit of 100% of transactions; flag any omission

metrics.name: Personalization Relevance
metrics.desc: Engagement lift from personalized vs generic content
metrics.drift: Engagement lift narrowing; unsubscribe rate increasing

metrics.name: P95 Latency
metrics.desc: 95th percentile agent response time
metrics.drift: Response time degradation; increasing timeout rates

metrics.name: Error Rate & Failure Modes
metrics.desc: % of interactions with agent errors, tool call failures, or crashes
metrics.good: <1% error rate; classified failure taxonomy maintained
metrics.drift: New failure modes emerging; error rate trending up

metrics.name: Data Freshness
metrics.desc: Whether each data feed meets its SLA (RT <5s, NRT <15min, batch <24h)
metrics.good: 99%+ data freshness SLA compliance across all feeds
metrics.drift: Any feed missing SLA >3 consecutive intervals

metrics.name: Token Usage & Cost
metrics.desc: LLM token consumption and associated cost per interaction
metrics.good: Declining cost per resolution; within budget allocation
metrics.drift: Cost per interaction rising without quality improvement

metrics.name: Availability
metrics.desc: Agent uptime and service availability
metrics.good: 99.9% availability; <4 minutes unplanned downtime per month
metrics.drift: Availability SLA breach; increasing error responses

metrics.name: Model Drift Detection
metrics.desc: Statistical divergence of model inputs/outputs from training distribution
metrics.good: KL divergence and PSI within acceptable bounds
metrics.drift: Automated monitoring of feature distributions; alert on shift

metrics.name: Bias Monitoring
metrics.desc: Outcome fairness across customer segments (demographics, tenure, value tier)
metrics.good: No statistically significant outcome disparities across protected groups
metrics.drift: Quarterly bias audits; continuous monitoring of outcomes by segment

metrics.name: PII / Data Handling Compliance
metrics.desc: Agent adherence to data minimization, masking, and access controls
metrics.good: Zero PII exposure in logs/transcripts; 100% masking compliance
metrics.drift: Automated PII scanning of all agent outputs and logs

metrics.name: Feedback Loop Health
metrics.desc: Whether human corrections are being incorporated into agent improvement
metrics.good: 90%+ of corrections reviewed within 7 days; retraining cycle <30 days
metrics.drift: Growing backlog; same errors recurring

metrics.name: Campaign Optimization Accuracy
metrics.desc: % of agent bid/budget recommendations that improve CPA or ROAS
metrics.drift: Recommendation-to-outcome correlation declining

metrics.name: Segmentation Quality
metrics.desc: Performance lift of agent-created segments vs manual segments
metrics.drift: Segment performance lift declining; definitions stale

metrics.name: Attribution Accuracy
metrics.desc: Alignment between attribution model predictions and actual outcomes
metrics.good: Model predictions within 15% of actual channel contribution
metrics.drift: Growing divergence between predicted and actual
